cwe.note: Observable Discrepancy — parent of CWE-204; applies when enumeration relies on timing or other side channels rather than explicit message differences

owasp_top10.note: Identification and Authentication Failures — username enumeration undermines authentication security
Broken Access Control — tangential; the system discloses information that should be access-controlled, but this is primarily an authentication/information-disclosure issue

owasp_api10.note: Broken Authentication — enumeration is a precursor to authentication attacks; OWASP API explicitly lists it under this category

mitre_attack.note: Gather Victim Identity Information: Credentials — username enumeration is a reconnaissance technique for credential gathering
